case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ROCHELLE BLACK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JUL-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, ROCHELLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACK, ROCHELLE $1,387.81 PRINCIPAL, $311.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,699.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62799704)
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) (TRANSACTION ID # 62799704) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, ROCHELLE DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2018
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [C.C.P. 1033] (TRANSACTION ID # 62799704) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $311.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62799704) AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK, ROCHELLE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62799704) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
